import { useState } from "react"; import Sidebar from "./Sidebar"; export default function MaterialExpenseManagement() { const today = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0]; const [activeForm, setActiveForm] = useState(""); const [materials, setMaterials] = useState([]); const [expenses, setExpenses] = useState([]); // ================= MATERIAL FORM ================= const [materialForm, setMaterialForm] = useState({ name: "", quantity: "", unit: "Kg", supplier: "", purchaseDate: today, costPerUnit: "", project: "", bill: "", remarks: "" }); // ================= EXPENSE FORM ================= const [expenseForm, setExpenseForm] = useState({ title: "", type: "Labor", amount: "", paymentMethod: "Cash", date: today, project: "", paidTo: "", bill: "", notes: "" }); // ================= CALCULATIONS ================= const totalMaterialCost = materials.reduce( (sum, m) => sum + Number(m.totalCost || 0), 0 ); const totalExpenseCost = expenses.reduce( (sum, e) => sum + Number(e.amount || 0), 0 ); // ================= MATERIAL ================= const handleMaterialChange = (e) => { setMaterialForm({ ...materialForm, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }); }; const addMaterial = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const total = Number(materialForm.quantity) * Number(materialForm.costPerUnit); const newMaterial = { ...materialForm, totalCost: total }; setMaterials([...materials, newMaterial]); setActiveForm(""); }; // ================= EXPENSE ================= const handleExpenseChange = (e) => { setExpenseForm({ ...expenseForm, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }); }; const addExpense = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); setExpenses([...expenses, expenseForm]); setActiveForm(""); }; return (
{/* DASHBOARD */} {activeForm === "" && ( <>
